title: Income Tax Department Issues Fresh Clarifications on Income Tax Act, 2025, and Income Tax Rules, 2026
content:
# Income Tax Department Issues Fresh Clarifications on Income Tax Act, 2025, and Income Tax Rules, 2026

Ek important update hai for all taxpayers and professionals! The Income Tax Department has released updated clarifications concerning the recently effective Income Tax Act, 2025, and Income Tax Rules, 2026, as of May 18, 2026. These clarifications aim to ensure a smoother transition and clearer understanding of the new direct tax regime.

Here are the key points from the latest release:

*   **Effective Date Confirmed:** The Income Tax Act, 2025, and the Income Tax Rules, 2026, have officially come into effect from April 1, 2026, and are applicable for the Tax Year 2026-27 onwards.
*   **Transition for Existing Cases:** For all tax years beginning before April 1, 2026, assessments, appeals, and other ongoing proceedings will continue to be governed by the erstwhile Income Tax Act, 1961. This ensures no disruption for pending matters.
*   **Dual Compliance Support:** The Income Tax Department's e-filing portal will facilitate compliance under both the old (1961) and new (2025) Acts concurrently, providing necessary forms and procedures for both regimes.
*   **Core Objective:** The new framework aims to streamline and simplify the tax code, reduce compliance burdens, and minimize litigation, aligning India's direct tax system with modern legislative standards through a more accessible and reader-friendly format, including the new 'Tax Year' concept.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/help/faqs/objective-and-scope-new-act)

*Published on: 20 May 2026*
